name: CardX: the Leader in Surcharge Compliance & 0% Processing
description_short: CardX by Stax enables businesses to accept credit cards at 0% net cost through compliant surcharging, allowing merchants to pass card fees to customers while keeping 100% of sales.
description_long:
CardX by Stax is a payment processing platform that specializes in surcharge compliance solutions for businesses. The company emerged as a leader in helping merchants reduce payment processing costs through legal credit card surcharging mechanisms. Their core innovation centers on automating the compliance complexity that has historically made surcharging difficult for small and mid-sized businesses to implement.

CardX offers a turnkey payment processing solution with three primary delivery channels: online (website payments), in-office (point-of-sale), and in-person (mobile/retail). The flagship feature is 0% net cost credit card acceptance, where merchants keep the full transaction amount and customers pay only a surcharge on credit card transactions—debit transactions remain free. The platform handles automated compliance across multiple payment processors and integrations, with the company serving 5,000+ customers directly and powering technology for 200+ payment processors and ISOs.

CardX distinguishes itself through scale ($55M in documented customer savings since 2023), infrastructure reliability (99.99% uptime), and specialized solutions for government and education sectors. The company maintains in-house customer support and emphasizes transparency about limitations and eligibility requirements. Their approach is customer-friendly by design—surcharges apply only to credit cards, preserving the customer choice to use debit without additional fees.

The honest assessment is that while CardX solves a real cost problem for eligible merchants, the solution is not universal. Surcharging eligibility varies by state, card network, and business type. The asterisked terms throughout their marketing material ("*Where eligible" and "**Terms and limitations apply") indicate material constraints. This is genuinely useful for qualifying businesses but requires verification before implementation.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 0% net cost on credit card transactions where eligible—merchants retain 100% of sale amount
Automated compliance handling across multiple processors and ISOs, removing manual compliance burden
$55M in documented savings delivered to customers since 2023, demonstrating measurable ROI
99.99% uptime guarantees reliable payment processing for time-sensitive transactions
Multi-channel payment acceptance (online, in-office, in-person) with unified platform
Customer-friendly design: surcharges apply only to credit cards; debit remains fee-free
Tailored solutions for government and education institutions with specialized requirements
cons: Surcharging is not eligible in all states and jurisdictions—significant geographic limitations apply
Compliance requirements and eligibility vary by card network, business type, and industry—requires verification
Debit card transactions still incur processing fees (not 0% cost), which may offset savings for debit-heavy businesses
Terms and limitations are substantial and delegated to fine print—actual cost structure requires detailed review
Marketing emphasizes '0% cost' heavily but relies on surcharge pass-through, which may reduce customer conversion or satisfaction
best_for: Small to mid-sized businesses in surcharge-eligible states seeking to reduce payment processing costs
Government agencies and educational institutions with strict compliance and affordability requirements
Merchants with high credit card transaction volumes where surcharge pass-through is operationally feasible
Multi-channel retailers (online + in-person) needing unified payment processing and compliance
diagnosis: CardX by Stax is best for businesses in surcharge-eligible jurisdictions that want to legally shift payment processing costs to customers while maintaining operational simplicity. The critical caveat is that surcharging eligibility, compliance requirements, and cost savings are heavily conditional on state law, card network rules, industry classification, and transaction mix—extensive verification with the company and legal counsel is necessary before assuming the advertised 0% cost applies to your specific business.
services: 0% net cost credit card surcharging with automated compliance
Online payment processing and website integration
Compliance automation across multiple card networks
Payment processor and ISO white-label technology
Customer surcharge choice and transparency tools
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: CardX by Stax offers 0% credit card processing through compliant surcharging, passing fees to customers while merchants keep 100% of revenue.
